'''Achonnko''' was a [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Master Trail Guide]] of the [[Rryatt Trail]], who had navigated the entire trail himself. He helped many adventurers survive the Rryatt Trail, and he always wore his [[Kashyyykian ceremonial armor|ceremonial armor]].<ref name="SWG" />

{{Char-stub}}
